textByHashes.9a19e904d457ab5699c09a64949b59c18a6384b2: Not to mention the chance to enjoy a good party.
textByHashes.df9a56459da5a08357748d8a2c6e6e437747da07: I'm not going to say no to going to a fancy party, even as the help.
textByHashes.44d37c21883429bf2cd4c6e3ce6396b558a892b7: Lots of the villas around here will have butlers, and butlers mean uniforms.
textByHashes.42734227fca13f56f0460b00fe312f6349f39b13: I suppose you could always put it back once you're done.
textByHashes.2c6327df2b272efaa72a3e6d4ea60e3200c5d52f: I doubt they'll ever even realise. Anyway, I remember seeing some uniforms through a window on the way over here. They were in a villa to the north.
textByHashes.0c3a651fbf4204afdb605bda05a009fc5408190c: Any luck finding that villa with the spare uniforms in yet?
textByHashes.589939ab6a971574f5f1ad1bbc1488f86ed62b40: I believe so. Once you get there, you should keep an eye out for any guards. Wouldn't want you to get arrested before the party starts!
textByHashes.765879b7b8eba842425500e71c850f824af6b0d9: I see you've managed to find a uniform.
textByHashes.d2f4cd5e30efeab3d474a540fc8b6ee1ddf791c5: It was a bit of a lucky spot, I must admit!
textByHashes.84098086b7530386c1c7cca0a10c67e77fc2caaa: Just good fortune. Now, I ought to get a move on getting this bag inside.
textByHashes.8ae0ea5aacfc3ddbea8f9ac7608841e2c6879d5e: What self-respecting man would have a wine cellar without such a historic wine in it?
textByHashes.ebba2473dcdfca7281789c6090914a2e1c275e00: So you're saying that you're actually more likely to be guilty yourself?
textByHashes.8d3a3d406ce8093e337912e4d9177baa78d56d32: But... that would be a terrible plan. You were here with us...
textByHashes.6f95f3247ca4e87597b48c08b098a3d31262835c: I took Patzi's bag to the backstage area, spent some time chatting to the actors, and then made my way to the party.
textByHashes.bb1016812700495153eda716567640f3874ac62d: Where are you going with this?
textByHashes.7dec48b49d542b539b5c300bcd293175e4561004: I just found them on the floor. It's bad manners not to pick up litter.
textByHashes.f6c1157751b24dd0cb20f59bbaadac8a0d72082a: Alright, fine. I admit I was in the cellar.
textByHashes.eabd2806fb816d2dbc401919fc01dd54e7470ef5: The Principum Red, you fool. I could retire on the value of that wine. All I had to do was get out of here with it.
textByHashes.ec33446966245d16dad9158ac62454acc5a336d5: And I probably would've got away with it too, if it wasn't for this precocious butler turned investigator you hired!
textByHashes.0a63ce5ed99ea5d18d5a1822a148ff48b8578fe3: Murder! What a ridiculous assertion! I may be a thief, but I'd never kill someone!
textByHashes.5a950c6079412f599b31fb9af02860eef3aec641: I could've killed you, but I'm not that kind of person, just like how I didn't kill Livius.
textByHashes.3e4b8fe32c74f095ae68a283e97b1b94f7cb4e26: Stop! You're too good for me! You win!
textByHashes.31c32c7d58fb6cd8a15343cdc00fc6be2cb1bb98: I promise I didn't do it! I'm just a thief! I wasn't even strong enough to defeat you. How could I have killed Livius?
textByHashes.572383fbf1753833ea60383fda93afb19581b388: Don't mind me, but if you're looking for something to do, this man here needs a hand.
